_note: Stage 5.5 Vision Judge (Plan 1.a). A seeded Swiss tournament of pairwise multimodal 'which clip is more engaging sound-off?' comparisons re-ranks the Pass C shortlist; win-count -> vision_rank + a BOUNDED raw_score reweight (+/- reweight_span) that propagates through Stage 6's raw_score sort. Never deletes a clip. Failure-soft: disabled / too-few moments / LM Studio outage / too-few comparisons all leave the Pass C order untouched. See AIclippingPipelineVault/wiki/concepts/clipping-quality-overhaul.md (Phase 1.a).
